tasks.title: Stage migration 046 — create generation_flows (owner-scoped, JSON canvas, version, soft-delete)
tasks.dod: Staged 01_create_generation_flows.up/down promote to live 046 and apply + revert cleanly against MySQL 8; idx_generation_flows_user_active_updated present.

tasks.title: Stage migration 047 — create flow_files pivot (CASCADE on flow, RESTRICT on file)
tasks.dod: Staged 02_create_flow_files.up/down promote to live 047 and apply + revert cleanly; FK to generation_flows CASCADE and to files RESTRICT verified; idx_flow_files_file present.

tasks.title: Stage migration 048 — add nullable flow_id/block_id + index to ai_generation_jobs
tasks.dod: Staged 03_add_flow_columns_to_ai_generation_jobs.up/down promote to live 048 and apply + revert cleanly; both columns nullable, no FK, idx_ai_generation_jobs_flow_id present; ALTER is INFORMATION_SCHEMA-guarded (idempotent).

tasks.title: Add flow-canvas Zod schema + extend the ai-generate job payload with flow linkage
tasks.dod: packages/project-schema exports a FlowCanvas Zod schema (blocks/edges/positions/per-block params) and the ai-generate job payload type carries optional flowId/blockId; unit tests for parse/round-trip pass.

tasks.title: Extend model catalog with modality + exclusiveGroup and backfill every model
tasks.dod: FalFieldSchema in packages/api-contracts gains optional modality + exclusiveGroup; every catalog field is backfilled (image_url→image, audio_url→audio, text→text); the kling/o3 prompt⊕multi_prompt XOR is expressed as exclusiveGroup; unit tests assert modality/group per representative model.

tasks.title: Implement generation-flow.repository (CRUD + optimistic-version save)
tasks.dod: Repository creates/reads/lists/renames/soft-deletes generation_flows owner-scoped (WHERE user_id AND deleted_at IS NULL); canvas save accepts a parent version and rejects a mismatch (returns conflict) while incrementing on match; integration tests against real MySQL pass.

tasks.title: Implement flow-file pivot repo + ai_generation_jobs flow back-link methods
tasks.dod: flow-file.repository links/soft-unlinks (flow_id,file_id); aiGenerationJob.repository gains write of flow_id/block_id and a read of all result-block job states for one flow_id (reattach query); integration tests cover link survival on flow delete and the per-flow job read.

tasks.title: Implement generation-flow.service (CRUD, autosave, optimistic-lock conflict)
tasks.dod: Service exposes list/create/open(canvas+job-states)/rename/delete and a version-aware canvas save; non-owner and absent are indistinguishable (NotFoundError); a stale-version save raises OptimisticLockError; unit + integration tests cover owner-scoping and the 409 path.

tasks.title: Implement static flow-pricing table + cost-estimate service
tasks.dod: lib/flow-pricing.ts holds a per-model static price; an estimate service resolves a block's model from the saved canvas and returns a best-effort Money estimate (bestEffort:true), non-mutating, no provider call; unit tests cover known + unknown model handling.

tasks.title: Implement per-Creator Redis sliding-window generation rate limit
tasks.dod: A rate-limit helper enforces ≤30 Generate runs/min/Creator via a Redis sliding window, returns allow/deny + retry-after seconds, and is independent of IP middleware; unit/integration tests drive the window past the cap and assert rejection (NFR §6 abuse guard, ADR-0004).

tasks.title: Implement the server-authoritative Generate validation gate
tasks.dod: flow-generate.service re-validates owner, required-input resolution, exactly-one-of exclusivity, content non-empty/valid, and referenced-asset presence BEFORE any enqueue — each failure raises the typed error mapping to its 422/404 code (asset-missing only for a previously-owned asset, never-owned → 404); unit tests cover every branch.

tasks.title: Implement Generate enqueue — job + flow_files link + idempotency
tasks.dod: On a passed gate + rate-limit check, the service creates the ai_generation_job (flow_id, block_id), enqueues the ai-generate BullMQ job, and is idempotent on a repeated Idempotency-Key (returns the first job); image/video/audio capabilities all route through the one path; integration tests cover accept + idempotent replay.

tasks.title: Extend media-worker to honor jobs.flow_id (link on success, single result, integrity)
tasks.dod: The ai-generate handler, when a job carries flow_id, writes the file row + flow_files link ONLY on success, keeps the first output and discards extras (single result), and writes no asset on failure/empty (publishes a failed state); worker integration test asserts asset-iff-success reconciliation and single-link.

tasks.title: Add flow CRUD controller + routes (list/create/get/rename/delete/canvas-save) + OpenAPI
tasks.dod: generation-flow.controller + generation-flows.routes (registered in index.ts after middleware) expose the six endpoints with Zod validation and owner check; non-owner → 404, stale canvas save → 409; the hand-maintained OpenAPI in packages/api-contracts is updated in the same commit; controller tests cover each outcome.

tasks.title: Add estimate + generate controllers + routes (422/429 mapping, Idempotency-Key) + OpenAPI
tasks.dod: Estimate (POST .../estimate) and Generate (POST .../generate, requires Idempotency-Key) endpoints map gate failures to the spec'd codes (flow.required_input_missing/exclusivity_violation/asset_missing/content_invalid → 422; rate-limited → 429 with Retry-After; stale version → 409); a 429 error sentinel is added to errors.ts; OpenAPI updated same commit; controller tests cover the branch matrix.

tasks.title: Build FlowListPage + flow api.ts + /generate-ai route (create/rename/delete/open)
tasks.dod: A new features/generate-ai-flow module renders the Creator's flows (most-recent first), supports create/rename/delete/open, and is reachable at /generate-ai (added in main.tsx); reuses existing list/button primitives + design tokens; component tests cover the list + CRUD actions against the flow api.

tasks.title: Build FlowCanvas + Content/Generation/Result nodes + typed-connection block + model-change reconciliation
tasks.dod: An @xyflow/react canvas renders content/generation/result nodes; a generation node shows the selected model's required input handles (typed by catalog modality); an incompatible drop is refused at connect-time with the expected-modality hint; a result-block output connects into a compatible input; changing the model rebuilds handles, prunes incompatible edges (telling which were removed) and preserves existing result blocks; component tests cover accept/reject + reconciliation.

tasks.title: Build Inspector + content input (text/upload/library pick) + optional-parameter editing
tasks.dod: Content blocks accept typed text, file upload, or a pick from the existing library asset picker; the side Inspector edits a generation block's optional model parameters; supplied content + params persist on the blocks and feed the next Generate; component tests cover each content source + param edit retention.

tasks.title: Build useFlowAutosave (version-aware, 409 conflict warning)
tasks.dod: Canvas edits debounce-autosave carrying the parent version; a 409 surfaces a conflict warning that asks the Creator to reload (first save stays authoritative, no silent overwrite); autosave ack target ≤800 ms is met; hook tests cover the success-version-bump and the conflict path.

tasks.title: Build CostConfirmModal + useFlowGeneration (estimate→confirm→generate, progress, reattach, retry, dominant preview)
tasks.dod: Pressing Generate fetches the estimate, shows the confirm modal (cancel → no call/charge), runs Generate with an Idempotency-Key, then a result block shows live progress via the shared useJobPolling and the dominant media preview on completion; on reopen it reattaches to a running job or shows the last-known done/failed state; a failed run shows the reason + a retry (a fresh, charged Generate); image/video/audio all render; hook + component tests cover confirm/cancel, progress, reattach, and failed/retry.

tasks.title: Backend integration suite — authz, optimistic-lock, rate-limit, validation gate, result integrity
tasks.dod: Integration tests (Vitest against real MySQL/Redis) cover: every flow operation by a non-owner → 404; concurrent-save → 409; scripted Generate past 30/min → 429; each gate-failure → its 422 code; never-owned asset → 404; forced-failure job → library-write reconciliation shows zero assets; suite is green.

tasks.title: E2E — assemble→connect→generate→library, reload restore, reattach, two-tab conflict
tasks.dod: An E2E run drives a full flow (add blocks, draw a typed connection, Generate with cost confirm, see the result in the block and the library), reloads to confirm canvas + results restore, exercises reattach to an in-flight generation, and saves the same flow from two tabs to confirm the second is rejected; the run is green in CI.

tasks.title: Selected model label readable on the generation node (review-2026-06-04 U1)
tasks.dod: GenerationNode model-label button uses TEXT_PRIMARY when a model is selected (TEXT_SECONDARY placeholder unchanged); component test asserts the selected-state color; web-editor feature suite green.

tasks.title: Inspector honors voice_picker — TTS/STS voice selectable with previews (review-2026-06-04 U2, AC-16)
tasks.dod: Inspector ParamField renders shared VoicePickerField for field.type==='voice_picker' (reusing shared/ai-generation picker + previews); GenerationParamFields no longer filters out required voice_picker fields (STS voice_id reachable); test asserts TTS+STS render the picker trigger (not a text input) and a chosen voice writes voice_id into block params; suite green.

tasks.title: Stage→promote migration 049 — create flow_model_pricing + seed from FLOW_PRICE_TABLE (ADR-0008, AC-20)
tasks.dod: Staged 04_create_flow_model_pricing.up/down promote to live 049 and apply + revert cleanly against MySQL 8; table seeded with all 14 FLOW_PRICE_TABLE rows (base_amount = current flat price, factors NULL).

tasks.title: Param-reactive DB-backed estimate — pricing repository + formula in estimateBlockCost (ADR-0008, AC-20)
tasks.dod: flow-model-pricing.repository reads flow_model_pricing with a short-TTL in-process cache; estimateBlockCost computes (base + per_second*duration_s + per_image*num_images) * resolution_mult[resolution]??1 with catalog-default fallback for unset params (music duration / music_length_ms/1000 normalized); no DB row falls back to static FLOW_PRICE_TABLE; bestEffort stays true; unit tests prove different duration/num_images/resolution yield different amounts + fallback path; integration test reads the seeded table; gates green.
